pageHeadertitle: How to use the Pokémon TCG Mulligan Calculator
textArea: Decks imported from TCG Live and the Limitless deck builder are accepted
errorFormat: Error processing cards, please check if they were copied correctly
loadingError: There was an error loading some of the cards
loadingErrorAPI: Error processing cards, please check if they were copied correctly
adviceText: Only the first 100 hands will be shown
importantText: It may take a while to load or your browser might block the page.
minCardText: There must be at least 7 cards
copyright: Mulligan Calculator is a non-profit, fan-made tool. This site is not affiliated with, endorsed, or supported by Nintendo, Game Freak, or The Pokémon Company. All card images and information are provided through the use of the TCGDex API.
